case_title: YUE FU LIN ET AL VS. AMAZON.COM, INC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [HEARING 05-29-24 @ 8:30AM] SERVED MAR-29-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM, INC

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY LIN, YUE FU CHEN, YAN HUI AS TO DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2024 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM LILLY ALEMAYEHU FILED BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-29-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF YUE FU LIN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF YAN HUI CHEN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY LILLY ALEMAYEHU. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, YUE FU CHEN, YAN HUI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM, INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, YUE FU AS TO DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM, INC
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR LILLY ALEMAYEHU FILED BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM, INC
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER LILLY ALEMAYEHU REQUEST
